mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_operation_metrics (metric_id, metric_date, total_sessions, self_resolved_sessions, human_handoff_sessions, avg_response_time_ms, satisfaction_score, hot_topics_json) VALUES (#{metrics.metricId}, #{metrics.date}, #{metrics.totalSessions}, #{metrics.selfResolvedSessions}, #{metrics.humanHandoffSessions}, #{metrics.avgResponseTimeMs}, #{metrics.satisfactionScore}, #{hotTopicsJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_sessions = VALUES(total_sessions), self_resolved_sessions = VALUES(self_resolved_sessions), human_handoff_sessions = VALUES(human_handoff_sessions), avg_response_time_ms = VALUES(avg_response_time_ms), satisfaction_score = VALUES(satisfaction_score), hot_topics_json = VALUES(hot_topics_json)
mapper.select: SELECT metric_id, metric_date, total_sessions, self_resolved_sessions, human_handoff_sessions, avg_response_time_ms, satisfaction_score, hot_topics_json FROM t_operation_metrics WHERE metric_date = #{date}

SELECT metric_id, metric_date, total_sessions, self_resolved_sessions, human_handoff_sessions, avg_response_time_ms, satisfaction_score, hot_topics_json FROM t_operation_metrics WHERE metric_date >= #{start} AND metric_date <= #{end} ORDER BY metric_date ASC
